findings.limitations: This structural audit checks whether the dossier statement exposes central hypotheses; it does not verify the omitted proof.
findings.observation: The audited statement exposes every required scope phrase and declared symbol.

findings.limitations: This verifies a representative finite-group instantiation, not Lemma 2.8 for every group, representation, and MLP.
findings.method: SymPy expansion of the paper's Reynolds operator for the C2 sign representation
findings.observation: Symbolic simplification reduced the claimed difference to zero.

findings.limitations: This is an exact finite two-site specialization, not a proof of Proposition 2.3 for arbitrary bundles.
findings.method: Z3 negated-implication check for the two-site permutation-only transporter constraint
findings.observation: Z3 found the negated implication unsatisfiable under the declared constraints.

findings.limitations: Checks the declared Hom(V_p,W_q) application shape for a representative finite-dimensional fiber pair.
findings.observation: All declared tensor operations and output dimensions are shape-consistent.

findings.limitations: Bounded numerical support duplicates the same representative instance and is not a general proof.
findings.method: Exact rational and 80-digit boundary/adversarial replay of the C2 Reynolds instance
findings.observation: No counterexample was found in 65 exact and high-precision samples.
